paired_books: 236 The Magical Hands of Sheng-yen Lu_CN.csv
275 Pith Teachings to the Path of Liberation_CN.csv
notes: High_King_Sutra.csv produced high-confidence Chinese-English phrase pairs.
Bilingual CN/EN book pairs were used to extract chapter title pairs and selected short body phrases.
Some English CSVs are dictionary-style single-column files and were not used for direct line pairing in this first pass.
corrections.generated.json includes seed corrections plus simplified/traditional variants for glossary terms.
